text: tungsten overhead won't die. crew swears they killed it. hero shot still has a warm cast. running 45 late — push dinner?
pushed it. grabbing oat milk from sweetleaf, you want large?
yes. also the linen napkins on the kitchen chair — please don't move them, they're for the friday shoot
...already moved them to the hall. thought they were laundry, sorry
mateo. laundry. they're vintage deadstock from the greenpoint market run. hall is actually fine tho
